title: Green Bit Becomes a Trap
description: Pages 11–15 focus on green bit becomes a trap, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as law's exchange with Doflamingo collapses as Fujitora and the Marines tighten the trap, while the Sunny team faces danger at sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That bat- Tleship is flying at us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: and Dofla- Mingo is coming from over there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're free to stay, but I cannot let him have Caesar.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And now some- thing's raining down from the sky!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: tora-man-kun, we're the swirlystraw crew now, so let's set sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I under- stand that we need to get Caesar far away from here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And I don't care if we have to go on ahead now, but...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I thought that dress- Rosa only represented a checkpoint in our plans.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And that our mutual goal was to take down the Emperor, Kaidou!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Focusing a bit too much on Dofla- Mingo!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: whoops that was careless. Law must be right below us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Is this really the time to be eating ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: This battle... seems to be changing location... so adjust our bearings.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Listen closely. Head for some- where that doesn't have clouds!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Dofla- Mingo has the ability of the ito ito no m.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: He can move through the air by attaching his strings to clouds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: So he can't chase you into an area with no clouds!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: strings...!! So that's what they were!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Get ready for the coup de burst!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Young Master! Please don't worry about me!!!

summary: Green Bit Becomes a Trap focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as law's exchange with Doflamingo collapses as Fujitora and the Marines tighten the trap, while the Sunny team faces danger at sea.
